token.description: Introspection write token. Falls back to INTROSPECTION_TOKEN env var.

baseUrl.description: Introspection OTLP base URL. Falls back to INTROSPECTION_BASE_URL env var.

serviceName.description: OTEL service name for resource identification.

captureMessageContent.description: Record LLM prompt/response content as span attributes.

captureToolInput.description: Record tool call arguments as span attributes.

captureToolOutput.description: Record tool results as span attributes.

maxCaptureLength.description: Max character length for captured content.
